{{External|rs=The General's Shadow (miniquest)}}
{{Has quick guide|mini=1}}
{{Infobox Miniquest
|name = 
|image = [[File:The General's Shadow.png|300px]]
|release = [[12 February]] [[2007]]
|update = A sq'irk a day...
|members = Yes
|series = [[Quests/Series#Mahjarrat|Mahjarrat]], #9
|developer = Nancy J
}}
'''The General's Shadow''' is a short [[miniquest]] that serves as a sequel to the [[Curse of the Empty Lord]] miniquest, and also continues the events of [[Fight Arena]].

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to the ghost of [[General Khazard]] roaming around the woods south-east of [[Rellekka]].
|startmap = 2716,3631
|description = Assist General Khazard and relay information from his scouts across Gielinor back to him.
|length = Medium
|requirements = *[[Curse of the Empty Lord]], for full [[ghostly robes]]
**Started [[Desert Treasure I]], for the [[ring of visibility]]
*[[Fight Arena]]
|items = *40 coins (70 coins if using boat to Karamja)
*[[Ghostspeak amulet]] (Morytania legs will not work)
*All pieces of the [[Ghostly robes]] set
*A [[ring of visibility]]
|recommended = *{{SCP|Combat|60|link=yes}}
*Combat equipment and [[food]] (prayer cannot be used)
*Fast travel to several locations:
**South-east of [[Rellekka]] to start the quest plus one additional trip - [[fairy ring]] {{fairycode|ajr}}, [[Teleport to House]] (Rellekka), or [[Fremennik sea boots 1]]+
**[[Seers Village]] (1 trip) - [[Camelot Teleport]]
**[[Tai Bwo Wannai]] (1 trip) - [[Tai bwo wannai teleport]] or [[fairy ring]] {{fairycode|ckr}}
**[[Tree Gnome Stronghold]] entrance (1 trip)- [[Necklace of passage]] (The Outpost), [[Spirit tree]] (Gnome Stronghold), or [[Slayer ring]] (Stronghold Slayer Cave)
**[[Draynor Manor]] western fence (1 trip)- [[Explorer's Ring 2]]+, [[Amulet of glory]] (Draynor Village), or [[Draynor Manor Teleport]]
**[[Shantay Pass]] (1 trip) - [[Amulet of glory]] (Al Kharid), [[fairy ring]] {{fairycode|biq}}
**[[Goblin Cave]] (1 trip) - [[Skills necklace]] (Fishing Guild) or [[Ardougne Teleport]]
|kills = [[Bouncer (ghost)|Ghost of Bouncer]] (level 160) (cannot use Prayer; safespottable)
|difficulty = Experienced
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Desert}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the miniquest
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Fremennik}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the miniquest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
===The Return of Khazard===
[[File:Khazard's message.png|thumb|Khazard's message to deliver to his scouts.]]
{{Needed|[[ring of visibility]], full [[ghostly robes]] and [[ghostspeak amulet]] (Morytania legs '''will not''' work), 40 [[coins]]}}

The ghost of [[General Khazard]] can be found wandering along the path to [[Rellekka]], between the [[Rellekka]] house portal and the [[Swaying tree]]. Note that he cannot be seen on the minimap and has a large wander range, so you will need to search for him around that area.

With your [[ring of visibility]], [[ghostspeak amulet]] and full [[ghostly robes]] equipped, speak to him. He will remark that you appear to walk and talk in the Shadow Realm, but although the player will look familiar to him, he will not recognise them from the events of [[Fight Arena]]. He requires the [[Sin Seer]] to judge you worthy before he will allow the player to assist him.

Head to [[Seers' Village]] and talk to [[Sin Seer]], found upstairs in the house with the [[water source]]. Bribe her with 40 coins, and she will give you [[Sin Seer's note|a note]] as exchange for your troubles. Return to General Khazard, and talk to him again. He will want you to visit four of his scouts around the world to deliver them a message.

===The ghost scouts===
You may visit the scouts in any order. Remember to wear your [[ring of visibility]], [[ghostspeak amulet]] and [[ghostly robes]]. As with other ghosts, they will not appear on the minimap. Speak to each scout to hear their report.

{| class="wikitable lighttable"
!Scout
!Map
!Location
!Fast Travel
|-
|{{chatl|Scout (Tai Bwo Wannai)|txt=Karamjan scout}} || {{Map|type=maplink|name=Scout (Tai Bwo Wannai)|x=2826|y=3066|r=10|mtype=square}} || Just east of [[Tai Bwo Wannai]], south of the Teak/Mahogany trees patch. || {{plink|Tai bwo wannai teleport}}, {{plink|fairy ring|txt=fairy ring|pic=fairy ring icon}} {{fairycode|ckr}} 
|-
|{{chatl|Scout (Tree Gnome Stronghold)|txt=Gnomish scout}} || {{Map|type=maplink|name=Scout (Tree Gnome Stronghold)|x=2461|y=3374|r=10|mtype=square}} || Entrance to the [[Tree Gnome Stronghold]]. || {{plink|Necklace of passage}} (The Outpost),  {{plink|Spirit tree|pic=Spirit tree icon}} (Tree Gnome Stronghold), {{plink|Slayer ring}} (Stronghold Slayer Cave) 
|-
|{{chatl|Scout (Falador)|txt=Falador Scout}} ||{{Map|type=maplink|name=Scout (Falador)|x=3072|y=3344|r=10|mtype=square|}} || Just between the east wall of [[Falador]] and the [[Draynor Manor]] western fence. || {{plink|Explorer's ring 2|txt=Explorer's Ring 2+}}, {{plink|Amulet of glory}} (Draynor Village), {{plink|Draynor manor teleport (tablet)}}
|-
|{{chatl|Scout (Shantay Pass)|txt=Kharidian scout}} || {{Map|type=maplink|name=Scout (Shantay Pass)|x=3304|y=3109|r=7|mtype=square|}} || Just south of the [[Shantay Pass]], in the area around the rock formations. || {{plink|Amulet of glory}} (Al Kharid), {{plink|fairy ring|txt=fairy ring|pic=fairy ring icon}} {{fairycode|biq}}
|}

Once you have visited all of the scouts, the final scout will give you a message to relay back to General Khazard. Return to him, and he will tell you to head to the "cave near where the fish-men gather" for your reward. He will give you a [[Severed leg (The General's Shadow)|severed leg]], which is apparently the "key" to your reward.

===Bouncer returns!===
{{Needed|[[Severed leg (The General's Shadow)|Severed leg]], [[combat equipment]]|recommended=[[food]]}}
[[File:Fighting ghost bouncer.png|right|250px|thumb|The player throwing the severed leg.]]

:'''Note''': During the following fight, you '''cannot''' use prayers, so be sure to bring food.

Head to the [[Goblin Cave]] located by the south-eastern corner of the [[Fishing Guild]]. Inside the cave head north, then take the first passage to the east, where you will arrive at a larger cavern. Once you are prepared for a fight with a level 160 [[bouncer (ghost)|ghost of Bouncer]], enter the "crack" in the south wall of the cavern.

{{Color|red|Warning:}} If you drop any items inside the fight area, you will lose them permanently when Bouncer dies.

Once inside, a short cutscene will play showing Bouncer ambushing the player, with the player complaining that Khazard DID recognise them afterall. Once it ends the fight will begin immediately.

[[File:Bouncer safespot in south-east corner.png|220px|left|alt=A screenshot depicting Bouncer's safespot location.|thumb|A player safespotting Bouncer in the south-east corner of the cave.]]

Bouncer is not resistant to any particular combat style, and has a 15% weakness to [[wind spells]]. He has a max hit of 15. He may be safespotted in the south-east corner of the cave. You can also hide in the south-west corner, where the ghost cannot hit you, and use poison to weaken it while hiding. If you are around a combat level of 100, supplies will most likely be unnecessary.

When his health drops to 10, the player will automatically throw the severed leg to distract the ghost. Once it is distracted, the player will say "Away, darn spot!" and deliver a final blow, killing it.

You will receive some Slayer experience and a new sword.
{{Clear|left}}

==Rewards==
*The [[Shadow sword]]. This can be reclaimed from the [[Ghost (The General's Shadow)|ghost]] that will appear after Bouncer's defeat for free.
*{{SCP|Slayer|2,000}} [[Slayer]] experience

==Required for completing==
Completion of The General's Shadow is required for the following:
* [[Secrets of the North]]

==Transcript==
{{Hastranscript|miniquest}}

==Music==
* [[Dogfight]]{{Listen
|title = [[Dogfight]]
|desc = The music which plays when battling the ghost of Bouncer.
|filename = Dogfight.ogg
}}

==Trivia==
*When Khazard hands you the severed leg, your player says: "''Ugh, well, at least it's not another hand.''" Then the General replies: "''What, have you dealt with severed limbs before?''" and the player replies: "''It's a long story.''" This is a reference to [[The Hand in the Sand]] quest.
*The final ghost you inform gives you a message to give to Khazard and adds on the statement: "''The messenger is Pavlov,''" probably referring to {{wp|Ivan Pavlov|Pavlov}}'s dogs and Khazard's dog [[Bouncer]].
*When throwing the severed leg in the final battle against the dog [[Bouncer (ghost)]], you automatically say "''Away, darn spot!''", which is a play on the famous dog name "Spot".
**This line is also similar to a classic oft-quoted line from Shakespeare's play ''{{wp|Macbeth}}'' wherein Lady Macbeth utters the phrase "Out, damned spot!" when she is sleepwalking and feeling guilty for helping to murder the Scottish king.
*The scouts will make references to quests that players have completed in their area. For example, if the player has completed the [[Vampyre Slayer]] quest then the Falador scout will talk about an adventurer killing [[Count Draynor]] and how he will have to verify whether this is true or not.
*The scouts are not human, as they repeatedly disparage humans during their conversations with the player. 

{{The General's Shadow}}
{{Miniquests}}
